response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-00:55: Performance of 'Dancing Reed'. Identified via search. Performed by Tokino Sora & Mori Calliope (Original Artist: Tokino Sora). 2. 00:56-03:12: MC/talk segment. No vocal music. 3. 03:13-05:01: Performance of 'Dawn Blue'. Identified via on-screen credit. Performed by Tokino Sora & Mori Calliope (Original Artist: Mori Calliope). 4. Lyrics for both songs retrieved via search.
response.global_summary: This video features a musical performance in a virtual reality setting, featuring Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope. The performance includes two songs, 'Dancing Reed' and 'Dawn Blue', separated by a brief talk/MC segment.

scenes.description: The video begins with a performance of 'Dancing Reed' by Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope in a virtual stage environment filled with green crystals.

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Okey-dokey, the answer is fine
But don't joke, I can't laugh
Congestion, ambiguity, which way are you facing?
I stretched my hand towards the mirage
A dream story like a slight fever
I pretended not to see such a light
Rustling heartbeat, don't go yet
I hate that it's a fantasy
Steal me away
Enchanting dancing, dancing night
Spreading out, an unstoppable universe
Your facial expressions might rewrite
My entire universe, the responsibility is heavy, you know
Everything and anything, dance, dance, dance
We are dancing reed
Becoming obsessed and intertwined, zero gravity
Without caring, dance, dance, dance
Just a dance, just a dance
My voice is left in the darkness
Even when I wake up, don't leave me
Maybe needy, I'm not in my right mind
I can't forget your body temperature
It's not just anybody
Keep it all to myself, euphoria
Words like 'I don't care' are decoration
I can't wash it off like makeup
360 degrees, even if it's a lie
It's like I can't hide it all
It's crazy, crazy love to be happy that you care for me
Take me away from the skyscrapers
Your facial expressions might swap
My deep psychology, the responsibility is heavy, you know
Passed-by neon, afterimage of a shooting star
If I drift like a glider
There would be neither happiness nor unhappiness
With my fingertips, I'm looking for you again
Let me hear that voice
Care for me, tell me what's beyond love!
Spreading out, an unstoppable universe
Your existence has stepped into
Even my future, go out with me, okay?
Everything and anything, dance, dance, dance
We are dancing reed
Becoming obsessed and intertwined, zero gravity
Without caring, dance, dance, dance
Just a dance, just a dance
My voice is left in the darkness
Even when I wake up, don't leave me

scenes.description: Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope talk and greet the audience.
Tokino Sora and Mori Calliope perform 'Dawn Blue' together in the same virtual stage environment.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
つかまえて、ほら この shooting star
a world of our fiction awaits...
ずっと同じ毎日に迷いがあっても
気づかないふりをしてたんだ
ほんのちょっとの勇気がまだ出せなくて
まどろむ宇宙で彷徨っていた
夜空に浮かぶ
星に願いをかけるんだ
i hope... 抱いている夢を
絶対諦めたく ない
走り出すから
追いかけて 今 あの shooting star
見たことのない ストーリー
進んでいくんだ
いつの 日にか きっと
描いた セカイ へ
辿り着けるように
let go
of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long?
もっと誰でもない自分になりたいんだ
新しい 風 が 心 を 揺らした
it takes something to believe
the wish we were promised could really come to life
and so,
if this how the story goes
to find that strength inside, i'll remember why back then
you took my hand, and you said...
つかまえて、ほら この shooting star
さあ、まずは 一歩 踏み出して 恐れずにゆこう
いつの 日にか きっと
まだ 見ぬ 世界 へ 辿り着けるように
夜明けに咲いた 月が 眩い ブルーの 空に 溶けてく
you and i, an undecided future,
doesn't matter if the final truth hurts
もうすぐ 朝 が 動き出すから
抱きしめて 今 この shooting star
見たことのない ストーリー
i'll be here betting on that
fearsome heart
cuz you're that shooting star
it's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
into the darkness, you'll find me
running by your side until the dawn
in the end, it's you and me
us against tomorrow
face the world that we had dreamed
dry your eyes, and don't look back.
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Go forth and seize this shooting star
A world of our fiction awaits...
I felt like something was amiss in my normal life,
But I always pretended not to notice
I couldn't put forth even an ounce of courage
So I dreamily drifted through space
I'll raise my eyes to the night sky
And wish upon that star
I hope...
I never want to give up on
The dream I hold so dear,
So I'll begin this journey
Chase after that shooting star
As we move forward to a brand new story
Hoping that someday
It will bring us to the world that we dreamed of
Let go
Of the days you thought mattered so, life goes on, tomorrow's rolling in
Is it the world we know, or the dream we sought so long?
More and more, I want to be someone unlike anyone else
A new wind has moved my heart
It takes something to believe
The wish we were promised could really come to life
And so,
If this how the story goes
To find that strength inside, I'll remember why back then
You took my hand, and you said...
Catch it, this shooting star!
Let's take the first step and go without fear
So we can someday reach
A never before seen world
The moon, blooming at dawn, melts into the dazzling blue sky
You and I, an undecided future,
Doesn't matter if the final truth hurts
Before long the morning will be on its way
Right now, embrace this shooting star
A never before seen story
I'll be here betting on that
Fearsome heart
Cuz you're that shooting star
It's hopeless now, but maybe if you take that step
Into the darkness, you'll find me
Running by your side until the dawn
In the end, it's you and me
Us against tomorrow
Face the world that we had dreamed
Dry your eyes, and don't look back.
